facebook.caption:
This beach fixes burnout.

Bãi Trường stretches for miles along Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Soft sand, warm water, and enough space that you won't feel like you're on a crowded resort beach. The sunset here hits differently when you've had a long travel day.

4.3 stars across 729 reviews. People keep coming back.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking Bãi Trường at golden hour. Miles of shoreline, barely anyone in frame. This is the Phu Quoc most tourists rush past on the way to their resort pool. 4.3 stars. 729 reviews. Draw your own conclusions.

instagram.caption:
This beach fixes burnout. Bãi Trường at golden hour is the reset you actually came to Vietnam for.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
instagram.video_caption: Miles of shoreline. Barely a crowd. Bãi Trường at sunset does something to you. 4.3 stars. 729 reviews.

tiktok.caption: The beach that fixes burnout. Bãi Trường at golden hour hits hard. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocBeach #VietnamTravel
